visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with brown hair, wearing a gray t-shirt, stands in a brightly lit indoor room. She holds a black tablet in her left hand, displaying a Threads social media post, and a smartphone in her right. She speaks animatedly to the camera, gesturing with her hands. The background features a white door with a circular pattern and a clothes rack with a black hanger. (2) The woman acts out a dramatic reaction to comments, splashing water onto the chest area of her gray shirt to simulate sweat. She pulls at the wet fabric with both hands, making exaggerated crying and frustrated facial expressions. Large text overlays in pink and white appear on the screen. (3) She transitions to a skincare routine, holding a bright yellow tub labeled 'able'. She uses a clear silicone brush to apply a translucent gel-like mask to her forehead and cheeks. Her expression shifts to one of relaxation and satisfaction. A small plant and various bottles are visible on a desk behind her. (4) She returns to her energetic persona, showing the tablet screen again to highlight specific user comments. She points to her arm and torso, demonstrating that she doesn't actually sweat much, appearing mock-offended and humorous. (5) The woman presents the yellow tub one last time, giving two thumbs up with a smile. She holds the tablet up, showing a poll or question box for her followers, inviting them to participate. The lighting remains bright and consistent throughout the sequence.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV 被留言氣到崩潰的韓國人. [Slogan]: 閱讀你們的留言. (2) [Variety]: (幸福). [Subtitle]: 怎麼辦 這個在Threads也是反應太熱烈了. (3) [Variety]: (已成為多汗的女子). [Variety]: (已變成6000個按讚). [Variety]: (真不理解😂). (4) [Subtitle]: 13karamusic: 不能說像汗, 根本一模一樣. [Subtitle]: 啊, 其實更像洗完手順便抹衣服上.... (5) [Variety]: (阿你 = 不是). [Variety]: ??????😂. (6) [Slogan]: 剛起床就用冰肌凍膜. [Slogan]: 生氣的時候用真的很舒壓. [Slogan]: 這是韓國的! 很好用!. (7) [Subtitle]: morriskparis: 來南部, 大家都會認為是汗. [Variety]: (封鎖中?😂). (8) [Subtitle]: williamchen0818: 不講沒事, 講了我跑去按讚. (9) [Subtitle]: fanzhewu: 是上次吃牛肉麵的痕跡 兩個月了衣服還不洗. (10) [Subtitle]: prank0806: 算了啦...就別穿就好了. [Slogan]: 委屈到不行. (11) [Slogan]: 韓國保養品的話 我都在Line群組分享喔!!. (12) [Slogan]: 大家幫我留言決定.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a simple gray casual t-shirt and striped pajama-style shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor room with a desk containing skincare bottles and a small plant, a white door with a decorative pattern, and a black clothes rack.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin Chinese with a cheerful and engaging tone. An upbeat, electronic background track with a steady 4/4 beat plays consistently. Short 'pop' UI sound effects trigger as text overlays appear on the screen. (2) The vocal delivery shifts to an exaggerated, high-pitched comedic scream and simulated sobbing. The sound of water splashing against fabric is audible, followed by percussive thudding sounds matching the woman's movements. (3) The energy levels lower as the speaker transition to a calm, soothing narrative. A 'ding' sound effect highlights the skincare product appearance. The sound of a brush gently swiping across a surface is subtly present. (4) The speaker resumes a defensive and humorous tone, speaking quickly with rising intonation to express mock outrage at user comments. The BGM maintains its bright, major-mode character throughout the explanation. (5) A final promotional sequence features a warm, inviting vocal quality. A closing chime sounds as the thumbs-up gesture occurs and the tablet screen is presented for a final call to action.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous 'POV' scenario where the creator reacts to social media comments accusing her of having sweat stains on her clothes. She uses this drama to transition into a promotional demonstration for a Korean 'ice gel mask' skincare product, suggesting its use for stress relief and cooling.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstration, brand name 'able' clearly visible on the tub, and mentions of sharing info in a Line group.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging short-form video that effectively blends comedy and community interaction with influencer marketing.
